project_summary: QAura Demo Store is a simple e-commerce web application built with FastAPI and SQLite. It includes features such as user registration, login, product catalog browsing, order placement, and a user dashboard for viewing order history.

components.name: Authentication Module
components.description: Test user registration, login, session management, logout, and session token invalidation. Validate against SQL injection and password storage vulnerabilities.

components.name: Product Catalog
components.description: Test product listing and individual product retrieval. Ensure proper handling of product data and input validation.

components.name: Order Placement
components.description: Test order calculation, discounts, stock management, and order placement functionality. Validate against potential vulnerabilities in order logic.

components.name: User Dashboard
components.description: Test user-specific order history display and authorization for accessing user-specific endpoints.

components.name: Database Schema
components.description: Test SQLite database schema and seed data for consistency and correctness.

components.name: Frontend Templates
components.description: Test HTML frontend pages for login, dashboard, and product listing. Validate input forms for XSS and injection vulnerabilities.

risk_areas: Authentication module may have SQL injection vectors
Input validation on all forms (XSS, injection)
